steps.title: Evaluate the border time
steps.content:
At the moment the train crosses the city border, $x=0$ hours. Substitute $0$ into the function.
$$f(0)=60(0)+18=18$$
So the train is $18$ kilometers from the station at the city border.

steps.title: Interpret the constant
steps.content: Because distance is measured from the station, the constant $18$ represents the distance between the station and the city border, not the train's speed after crossing the border. The answer is A.
